description: Source list for RTO regulatory news monitoring. Sources with requires_firecrawl=true are fetched via the Firecrawl API to bypass WAF/JS-rendering issues. Others use plain curl.

sources.name: ASQA Latest News
sources.notes: Primary RTO regulator. WAF-blocked to curl, accessible via Firecrawl. Canonical news index page.

sources.name: ASQA Media Releases
sources.notes: ASQA enforcement actions, deregistrations, provider sanctions. Highest content value for LinkedIn — audit-finding stories perform well.

sources.name: Skills Insight
sources.notes: Jobs and Skills Council for training package development. RSS works via curl directly.

sources.name: Jobs and Skills Australia
sources.notes: Strategic workforce body. Reports shape which qualifications get funding priority. /news-and-media URL returns 404 as of 2026-06-11; correct URL is /news.

sources.name: Home Affairs Newsroom
sources.notes: Student visa policy and CRICOS-relevant announcements. The CRICOS suspension story originated here, not at ASQA.

sources.name: ITECA News
sources.notes: Independent Tertiary Education Council. Working via curl as of 2026-05-26. DNS occasionally flakes.

sources.name: ASIC Newsroom
sources.notes: JavaScript-rendered. Use Firecrawl with waitFor=3000 retry. Filter heavily — most ASIC news not RTO-relevant.

sources.name: TEQSA News
sources.notes: Higher ed regulator. Only relevant for dual-sector RTOs.

sources.name: DEWR Skills and Training
sources.notes: Currently returns navigation hub only — needs better news-specific URL. Low yield until fixed.

sources.name: NCVER News
sources.notes: Vocational education research. Publishes infrequently — most updates pre-date 7-day window.

sources.name: training.gov.au
sources.notes: JS-rendered SPA. Training package updates only — sparse news.
